title: calculation.eec.created data
description: Data payload for the calculation.eec.created event, emitted when an EEC calculation job is accepted and queued.

jobId.description: UUIDv7 job identifier; also the Temporal workflow ID.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the submitting organization.

calcType.description: Calculator type. Always 'eec' for this event.

calcName.description: Optional human-readable calculation name supplied at submission.

submittedBy.description: Identity of the submitter (e.g. API key label or user email).

submittedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the job was accepted.
